response.justification: Candidate has strong geospatial background through GISCollective and solid distributed systems experience from Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, but the core technical requirement of modern C++ or Rust is barely met — only 6 months of C/C++ at National Instruments back in 2014-2015, with the last decade focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. No navigation/routing pipeline experience is evident. Worth a screening call to probe DLang-to-C++ transferability and current systems-programming depth, but unlikely to clear a senior C++ bar.
strengths: Geospatial domain experience via GISCollective (open-source GIS platform)
Low-latency distributed systems work at Sociomantic handling millions of requests/sec
Strong Linux, systems, and DLang background transferable to C++/Rust mindset
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ (2014-2015); no Rust experience listed
Recent 5+ years dominated by TypeScript/Node.js web work, not systems engineering
No navigation, routing, or map-tiling pipeline experience
